title: antirrhinum majus subsp. barrelieri
intro: Antirrhinum majus subsp. barrelieri, also known as the Barrelier's snapdragon or yellow snapdragon, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, and its flowers have a range of medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Antirrhinum majus subsp. barrelieri include reducing inflammation and improving digestive issues, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
